name: Mexican Chef Salad
recipeIngredient: 1 can kidney beans, rinsed and drained
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix together dressing ingredients and chill.
2. Cook ground beef until fully cooked.
3. Drain the cooked beef and mix with 1 tablespoon of chili powder.
4. In a large bowl, combine the remaining salad ingredients (lettuce, tomatoes, cheese, avocado).
5. Pour the chilled dressing over the salad mixture.
6. Toss all ingredients to ensure even distribution of dressing.
7. Top the salad with crushed tortilla chips before serving.
